Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

Class RestAuthenticator

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.RestAuthenticator
Direct Known Subclasses:
RestAuthenticator.Null
public abstract class RestAuthenticator extends Object
Resource-level authentication SPI for @Rest resources.

Resolves a request's Principal and roles, reusing the same Authenticator implementations (SAML/OAuth/JWT/API-key) used by the servlet-filter layer. Same three-state contract as Authenticator:

  • Optional.empty() — does not apply (anonymous passthrough).
  • Optional.of(AuthResult) — authentication succeeded.
  • throw AuthenticationException — credentials present but invalid.
See Also:
  • Authenticator
  • AuthResult
  • REST Authenticator
Since:
10.0.0

    RestAuthenticator.Null
    Sentinel "unset" type for @Rest(authenticator=...); never authenticates.

    • RestAuthenticator

      public RestAuthenticator()

  • Method Details

    • authenticate

      public abstract Optional<AuthResult> authenticate(RestRequest req) throws AuthenticationException
      Resolves identity + roles for the request.
      Parameters:
      req - The REST request. Never null.
      Returns:
      The auth result, or Optional.empty() if this authenticator does not apply.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException - If credentials are present but invalid.

    • of

      public static RestAuthenticator of(Authenticator a)
      Adapts any Authenticator (e.g. an AuthFilter or AuthFilterChain bean) into a RestAuthenticator.
      Parameters:
      a - The authenticator to adapt. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new RestAuthenticator.
